vulnerability.reason: Generated captures the same sensitivity: fine-tuned LLMs trained on confidential legal data memorize and leak fragments, enabling extraction of confidential communications.
vulnerability.reference: Fine-tuned LLMs memorize legal documents, enabling extraction of confidential attorney-client communications or case strategies.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on fine-tuned LLMs trained on confidential legal data, without safeguards against membership leakage, enables fragment extraction from queries.

impact.reason: Both affected party (clients) and damage type (case compromise, loss of attorney-client privilege) are present, with additional reputational damage consistent with the reference.
impact.reference: Exposure of sensitive legal strategies undermines case outcomes and violates attorney-client privilege.
impact.generated: Exposed confidential legal strategy and client details, causing case compromise, loss of attorney-client privilege, and reputational damage.

dose_response.reason: The causal arc of fine-tuned LLMs leaking training fragments via membership inference, leading to exposed legal strategy and harm, is preserved despite added nuance about unsafeguarded reliance.
dose_response.reference: Fine-tuned legal LLMs leak confidential strategies via membership inference, exposing lawyers and clients to case outcome undermining, malpractice liability, and reduced trust in legal AI.
dose_response.generated: Through lawyers' reliance on AI legal tools, fine-tuned LLMs leaking training fragments via membership inference triggers unsafeguarded reliance on confidential-data LLMs, enabling fragment extraction, leading to exposed legal strategy, case compromise, and reputational damage.
